briefdescription.para: Text overlay applied to inline or block content.
Block indentation and margins.
Optional prefix inserted before the rendered content.
Optional suffix appended after the rendered content.
Optional fill character for filled headings or separators.
Optional list marker.
Create an empty style rule.
Get the text overlay applied to inline or block content.
Replace the text overlay applied to inline or block content.
Replace the text overlay applied to inline or block content.
Get the full paragraph indentation settings.
Replace the full paragraph indentation settings.
Get the margins around the block.
Replace the margins around the block.
Replace the margins around the block.
Replace the margins around the block.

memberdef.argsstring: (int top, int right, int bottom, int left) noexcept
memberdef.name: setMargins

briefdescription.para: Replace the margins around the block.
Set the shared line indent.
Set the first-line indent.

parameterdescription.para: The new first-line indent, or ParagraphIndents::cUseLineIndent.

briefdescription.para: Set the wrapped-line indent.

parameterdescription.para: The new wrapped-line indent, or ParagraphIndents::cUseLineIndent.

briefdescription.para: Get the optional prefix inserted before the rendered content.
Set the optional prefix inserted before the rendered content.
Set the optional prefix inserted before the rendered content.

parameterdescription.para: Optional style for the prefix text.

briefdescription.para: Remove any configured prefix.
Get the optional suffix appended after the rendered content.
Set the optional suffix appended after the rendered content.
Set the optional suffix appended after the rendered content.

parameterdescription.para: Optional style for the suffix text.

briefdescription.para: Remove any configured suffix.
Get the optional fill character for filled headings or custom separators.
Set the fill character for filled headings or custom separators.
Set the fill character for filled headings or custom separators.

parameterdescription.para: Optional style for the fill character.

briefdescription.para: Remove any configured fill character.
Get the marker configuration.
Get the marker configuration.
Replace the full marker configuration.
Configure a literal marker.
Configure a literal marker.
Configure an ordered marker.

parameterdescription.para: The text appended after the item number.

briefdescription.para: Configure an ordered marker.

parameterdescription.para: The text appended after the item number.

briefdescription.para: Remove any configured list marker.
One configurable rich-text style rule with convenient fluent setters.
